economic_notes: Wolf Lake First Nation owns Anishnabek Outfitting Inc. (100%), 2748-6794 Quebec Inc. (100%), and Mahingan Development Corporation (100%). Anishnabek Outfitting Inc. and 2748-6794 Quebec Inc. are consolidated. Mahingan Development Corporation is accounted for on modified equity basis. Authorized line of credit of $50,000 at prime plus 2.00%, unused at year end.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (not 2024 as template default). Province is QC (Quebec). Three subsidiaries: Anishnabek Outfitting Inc. and 2748-6794 Quebec Inc. are fully consolidated; Mahingan Development Corporation is accounted for on modified equity basis (net loans of $637,816 and equity pick-up of $590,845 shown separately on balance sheet). Net deficit from investment in controlled entity of $32,415 reduces surplus. Prior year auditor issued unmodified opinion October 15, 2020. No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text. ISC reconciliation shows Fixed Contribution $449,172 and Grant $125,150 totalling $574,322. Total government transfers calculated as federal ($1,173,562) + provincial ($576,408) = $1,749,970 per segment disclosure totals.
